tools.Name: OpenViking
tools.Description: An open-source context database for AI agents that unifies management of memories, resources, and skills using a file system paradigm.
tools.Use_Case: Unified context management for complex agents, enabling hierarchical context loading, recursive retrieval, and automated session memory iteration.

tools.Name: Deep Agents
tools.Description: An opinionated, batteries-included agent harness built with LangChain and LangGraph for rapid agent development and deployment.
tools.Use_Case: Building and deploying complex agents with built-in capabilities for planning, file system access, shell execution, and sub-agent delegation.

tools.Name: MiroThinker
tools.Description: A series of deep research agents optimized for complex research, prediction tasks, and long-horizon reasoning.
tools.Use_Case: Advanced research tasks requiring long-context reasoning, web navigation, and deep multi-step analysis using interactive scaling.
